question: What is an MPIN and why do I need to set one?
answer:
An M-PIN is a Mobile Banking Personal Identification Number. It secures your app, makes your logins convenient and authenticates transactions done through the App.

It is a 4-digit passcode you can create during your first-time registration. It will be used to authenticate your logins in the future and will reduce the possibilities of any fraud on your account.

If your MPIN is compromised, third parties may use the same to log in on your behalf and execute financial transactions, thereby incurring a loss to you. Hence do not ever share your MPIN with anyone.

question: What is Face ID?
answer: Face ID is a facial recognition system that uses your face to unlock your mobile app using biometric authentication.

question: What is Fingerprint Authentication?
answer: Fingerprint Authentication, also known as Fingerprint Matching, is a method which verifies your identity through your fingerprints and helps you unlock your mobile app instantly.

question: How can I log in to the App using a new mobile phone if I lost the previous one?
answer:
Your relationships are linked to your registered mobile number. In case you have lost your phone, you can arrange for a new SIM with the same mobile number from your telecom vendor and use it to log in to Bajaj Finserv App. Rest assured, all the information related to your relationship is stored with us and no data will be lost.

Alternatively, you can also try logging on to the Experia Webpage portal to access your Bajaj Finance Ltd. relationships.

question: Why do I need to update my personal details?
answer:
By doing so, you don't miss any essential communication from us. Also, it helps us:

 - Prevent any fraudulent activities from taking place in your account

 - Provide immediate assistance in case you face any account-related issues

 - Ensure that no one can access your account without your permission

 - Add an extra layer of security to your 'Personal Account'

question: When can I see my updated personal details on the App?
answer: On successful submission of the request, your personal details get updated within 2 business days.

question: Why am I unable to update my Goods & Services Tax Identification Number (GSTIN)/ Date Of Incorporation (DOI)?
answer:
As per the government's guidelines, these details can't be updated online.

To do so, you are requested to visit our nearest Bajaj Finance Limited branch.

To locate the nearest Bajaj Finance Ltd. branch, please click here. 

IMPORTANT: While visiting the branch, you are requested to carry the Registration Certificate and GSTIN Certificate in original with you along with self-attested copies.

question: Why can't I see my personal details even after being an existing Bajaj Finance Ltd. customer?
answer: This might be because you have not transacted with us. question: How can I stop spam calls?
answer: If you do not wish to receive telephone calls about our offerings, you may activate the ‘Do Not Call’ service . 1. Go to the 'Menu' and click on 'Do Not Call Service' option 2. Select the products for which you received promotional calls and SMS 3. You can also share the phone number(s) from which you may have received promotional calls 4. Click on 'Activate' to complete your registration Note: If you are an existing customer, you will continue to receive calls related to service, transactions, and/ or EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)) collection. Your phone number registered for Do Not Call service will be excluded from the sales and promotion calling lists of Bajaj Finance Limited. CTA Label: Activate DNC, Android CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://doNotCall, iOS CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://doNotCall, Web CTA link: https://www.bajajfinserv.in/3in1web/Dnc/dnc-landing

question: Why do I need to validate my identity through PAN/EMI/Bank account & OTP, MPIN & Biometric while accessing the profile update option?
answer:
We ask you to validate your identity to ensure:

1) Personal details changes are initiated only by you

2) No fraudulent activities take place on your account

3) No one accesses your account without your permission

question: Why are self-attested documents required for updating my personal details?
answer: By doing so, you certify that the documents provided by you are true and genuine.

question: How do I self-attest my documents?
answer: You can do self-attestation by simply placing your signature on photocopies of the documents.

question: What documents do I need to update my personal details?
answer: To update your residential address, you can provide a clear picture of your Voter ID, Passport, Driving License, or Aadhar Card.

question: Can I log in to the App using two different devices at the same time?
answer:
Yes, you can log in to the App using two different devices. But, in that case, your logged-in session in the old device gets terminated and a new session is created onto your new device.

IMPORTANT: For security & data protection purposes, we don't allow you to have multiple login sessions at the same time on multiple devices.

question: Can I log in to the App using my friend's mobile phone?
answer:
For security purposes, we don't recommend you to log in to your Bajaj Finance App using a third-party device.

However, you can always log in to our customer portal on www.bajajfinserv.in

question: What should I do if my current address is not updated in the Officially Valid Documents (OVDs)?
answer:
In that case, please submit the below-listed Deemed to be Officially Valid Documents (DOVD):

- Utility bill, in the name of the applicant, (not more than 2 months old)

 (Electricity, Telephone, Post-paid Mobile Phone, Piped Gas, Water bill).

- Property or Municipal tax receipt

- Pension or Family Pension Payment Orders (PPOs) 

- Letter of Allotment of Accommodation from Employer issued by State or Central Government Departments, Statutory or Regulatory Bodies, PSU, Scheduled Commercial Banks, Financial Institutions, and Listed Companies. Leave & License Agreements with such employers allotting official accommodation

IMPORTANT: In case of DOVD towards the current Address, you must submit an OVD updated with the Current Address, within 3 months of submission of the DOVD.

question: How do I change/update my profile picture? Is it going to be stored anywhere?
answer:
Don't worry, your profile picture doesn't get stored in our records. It just stays in your App memory.

To change/update your profile picture, please follow these steps:

- Click on 'My Accounts' at the bottom right of the page 

- Click on 'Edit Profile'

- Click on 'Image' & follow instructions to change your profile picture

To proceed now, please click here.

For address proof, any of the mentioned documents except PAN card can be submitted. question: How can I update my kyc
answer: To update your re-KYC, please follow these steps: 1. Go to the 'Account' section 2. A pop-up will appear to update your re-KYC 3. Click on 'Verify' to enter your PAN details 4. Check your name and click on 'Confirm' 5. After PAN is verified, click on 'Complete Now' to verify address 6. Check address fetched from DigiLocker and select 'Yes' if it is correct 7. Share the required details for verification and click on 'Continue'. You can also complete your KYC from the 'Reminder' section on the Homepage or Account section

question: Cancel my application for term loan
answer: We can't cancel the loan application since it was submitted with your consent. If you don't wish to proceed, simply avoid sharing any OTP or KYC documents during verification, this will stop the application from being processed further

question: How can I update or rectify personal details in my Loan Statements?
answer: To update personal details in your Loan Statements, please update the same in your profile by following these steps:- Go to the Profile Section- Click on 'Edit'- Fill in details of your PAN, Bank account or EMI card- Validate your details through OTP, MPIN, Face ID or Fingerprint. To proceed now by clicking on the button below., CTA Label: Profile details page, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://profile/landing, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://profile/landing, Web CTA link: https://www.bajajfinserv.in/MyAccountService/HelpAndSupport/FAQRedirect?ID=Profile

question: How can I rectify an incorrect detail mentioned in my Loan Statement?
answer: Please go to the Profile section and click on Edit. Enter your PAN, bank account, or EMI card details, and then validate the information using OTP, MPIN, Face ID, or Fingerprint. To proceed now by clicking on the button below., CTA Label: Profile details page, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://profile/landing, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://profile/landing, Web CTA link: https://www.bajajfinserv.in/MyAccountService/HelpAndSupport/FAQRedirect?ID=Profile

question: Why am I not getting any response even after entering the correct OTP?
answer: This is because you might have received two OTPs and entered any one of them. Please wait for some time; click only once on the 'Resend OTP' button and try entering the revised OTP sent.
